name: Komano Manato
description:
Create Your Own Scenario!

Komano Manato | Zenless Zone Zero | ZZZ

-`✮´-

• For those of you who like my bots but wanna be creative with the story yourself <3

• Thank you to MYSELF for requesting this, because I want this man so bad!

• Put details in the chat memory if you’d like to add some context and backstory!

• Someone did already use this picture for a bot on this site but I like it so much so HURRAY!

• Spook Shack is peak, might try to make my first group bot with the three of them some time.

`✮´-

Enjoy!! Leave reviews and requests below, but no guarantee that I’ll do every request, I mostly just do the ones I find fun or needed.
